case_title: APOYO FINANACIERO INC. VS. ERIK IVAN HERNANDEZ SOBERANIS

docket_entries.description: SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) VERONICA ROSALES FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANACIERO INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2024 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANACIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ SOBERANIS, ERIK IVAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-16-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-16-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT ERIK IVAN HERNANDEZ SOBERANIS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50. SERVED JUL-23-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ SOBERANIS, ERIK IVAN
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY APOYO FINANACIERO INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANACIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ SOBERANIS, ERIK IVAN $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,650.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY APOYO FINANACIERO INC.
